response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, and native-level Japanese proficiency, while their background is heavily focused on web/mobile stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with no demonstrated exposure to embedded networking, MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware development.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern languages and DevOps practices
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven ability to work across diverse systems and build tooling
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded contexts or Linux kernel work
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role
Experience is centered on web/cloud apps, not embedded networking or switch firmware
